## 3. Decommission Phases

### Phase 1: Preparation
- [ ] Notify stakeholders
- [ ] Document current state
- [ ] Identify all integrations
- [ ] Plan data migration/archival

### Phase 2: Migration
- [ ] Migrate active users to new system
- [ ] Transfer essential data
- [ ] Update integrations
- [ ] Verify migration completeness

### Phase 3: Sunset
- [ ] Disable new access
- [ ] Set read-only mode
- [ ] Final data export
- [ ] Monitor for issues

### Phase 4: Shutdown
- [ ] Stop all services
- [ ] Archive final backups
- [ ] Release infrastructure
- [ ] Update documentation
